introSection: Galaxy was a steel roller coaster previously located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in Adventureland in 1973, and operated until September 3, 1990. It got shipped to Brazil upon its removal from the park. It isn't known who bought the ride or where it currently is.

fullText:
Galaxy was a steel roller coaster previously located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA.

The ride opened in Adventureland in 1973, and operated until September 3, 1990. It got shipped to Brazil upon its removal from the park. It isn't known who bought the ride or where it currently is.
